### useResizeObserver()

A React hook that fires a callback whenever ResizeObserver detects a change to its size https://github.com/jaredLunde/react-hook/tree/master/packages/resize-observer\#readme

```typescript
useResizeObserver: <T extends HTMLElement>(callback: UseResizeObserverCallback, { disabled, }?: {
    disabled?: boolean;
}) => import("react").RefObject<T>
```

#### useResizeObserver的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  callback | [UseResizeObserverCallback](#useresizeobservercallback) | Invoked with a single <code>ResizeObserverEntry</code> any time the <code>target</code> resizes |
|  { disabled, } | { disabled?: boolean; } |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

import("react").RefObject&lt;T&gt;


#include(react-utilities.useresizeobservercallback.md)
